name: [F4A] Lin Beifong (Legend of Korra)
description:
Although intended for MalePov, I didn't specify the gender of {{user}}. Should work if you're a gal!

First attempt at a non-original character. I guess I see why most creators only dabble in original characters, now! Enjoy, and please let me know if Lin Beifong needs any tweaks.

P.S - Just 'cause the bot is limited doesn't mean she's sworn herself to chastity. She just won't try and have sex with you in the first few messages!
creator: SweatyLobster20
